entries.back_en: Master Ukon! It is with great satisfaction that I report that my
belongings are unpacked and await the porters.
I am VERY tired, sir. Nothing more do I desire now
than a brief rest in restorative sleep!
I ask your understanding, for time is finite and my tasks are
countless. But wait! I behold a muse!
entries.note: 'But soft' traduzido como 'Mas aguarda', registro arcaico adequado

entries.back_en: Fair one, thy visage is a bud on the brink of
Would that all could behold its blooming before
that day arrived!
Hast thou no eyes to see, friend? Rare even among the
countless beauties of the imperial capital are such
visions of splendor.
Alas, gentle lady! I pray you, that was not my intention!
Your beauty has simply captivated me.
Th-That is--ah, ahem! I pray you, calm your
suspicions and grant me your pardon. Maroro is how you
may call me.
If my eyes deceive me not, as much as dear Master
Ukon's deceive him, you are our fellow guest (fem.)
hospitable house?
On behalf of our company, I beg you forgive
our ruckus. We seek only benign revels.
I beg leave, sir and lady.
I see... you prefer your menfolk to talk like this...
like this... eth? I pray you! Verily!
I thought you enjoyed men who speak so.
What ails you?
Mmmaster Ukon, with whom do you speak thus--?
entries.note: 'falais tu' mistura conjugação vós com pronome tu; aceitável por fala embriagada

entries.back_en: Ohoho, 'tis my LADY once again!
Whaaat? I pray you, MASTER Ukon. I am but the
PICture of--hic!--total sobriety.
Bah! My mind is so keen that the Mikado HIMSELF
respects its brilliance. A scholar am I,
in case you (plural) have forgotten!
entries.note: 'tenham' 3ª pessoa plural; tolerável na fala bêbada

entries.back_en: Nyo ho ho ho HO! Your words warm the very
COCKLES of my being. Oh, go on, sweet paragon of
entries.note: 'paragon' mantido em inglês; deveria ser traduzido (ex: paradigma/modelo)

entries.back_en: earthly beauty.
Ho ho! Master Ukon himself SEEKS my aid, sir,
worth more than a hundred swords and much more.
Ho ho HO, surely, such station comes not from
mere laziness!
In truth, Maroro is nothing but an abject fraud.
A worthless useless one, unworthy even to breathe...
entries.note: 'fraud' omitido, mas já presente na linha anterior
